title: integration tests: default to /var/tmp
body: Default to running integration tests using /var/tmp as scratch space, since it's more likely to support proper SELinux labeling than /tmp, which is more likely to be on a tmpfs.

comments.body: LGTM, assuming happy tests.  Is this something we should add to kpod and maybe others?

Okay, merging this, since I think it's a problem for other open PRs.
